data.title: Tradr launches new short leveraged ETFs seeking 200% inverse daily exposure on APLD, IREN, LCID, and NBIS stocks.
data.description: New York-based Tradr ETFs has recently introduced four new short leveraged ETFs for sophisticated investors and professional traders. These funds aim to achieve a 200% inverse daily exposure on Applied Digital, IREN, Lucid, and Nebius stocks. This move was announced on January 22, 2026. It signifies a strategic shift towards offering unique investment opportunities in the market.

data.title: Tapestry, Inc. will host a conference call on Feb 5, 2026 at 8:00 a.m. to discuss fiscal Q2 results. Call 1-866-847-4217 or visit www.tapestry.com/investors for webcast.
data.description: Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE: TPR) is scheduled to hold a conference call on Thursday, February 5, 2026 at 8:00 a.m. (ET) to discuss their fiscal 2026 second quarter results, which will be released via press release earlier that morning. Those interested can participate in the call by dialing 1-866-847-4217 or 1-203-518-9845 and providing the Conference ID 4882019. Alternatively, the audio webcast can be accessed at www.tapestry.com/investors. A telephone replay of the call will be available for a period of five days.

data.title: BJ's Wholesale Club opening in Chattanooga, TN on Jan 30, with sixth location in TN. Gas station opened on Jan 14.
data.description: BJ’s Wholesale Club (NYSE: BJ) revealed today that its new store in Chattanooga, Tennessee, will officially welcome customers starting January 30. Situated at 401 Northgate Mall Drive, this marks the sixth BJ’s location in Tennessee. Additionally, the site features a BJ’s Gas station that commenced operations on January 14, providing competitive fuel prices along with potential discounts through the BJ’s Fuel Savers Program. The store promises unmatched value on daily necessities, ensuring a convenient shopping experience for all visitors.

data.title: US Foods (NYSE: USFD) to discuss Q4 and fiscal year 2025 results on Feb 12, 2026, 8am CST. Dial 877-344-2001 with Conference ID 2528845.
data.description: US Foods Holding Corp. (NYSE: USFD) based in Rosemont, Illinois, has announced plans to hold a live conference call and webcast to review their financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending in 2025. The event is scheduled for Thursday, February 12, 2026, at 8 a.m. CST. Those interested can join the call by dialing 877-344-2001, with participants advised to dial in 10 minutes before the scheduled start time and input the Conference ID 2528845 for connection. A replay of the call will be accessible following the event.

data.title: AI email tools have 36% worker adoption rate but still feel generic. Context-aware agents offer potential solution. Full analysis available.
data.description: Recent analysis highlights the continued lack of personalization in AI email tools despite a significant 36% of employees using them. To address this issue, context-aware agents are being seen as a promising solution. These agents aim to enhance the user experience and address the generic feel currently prevalent in AI email tools.

data.title: Ethereum bears eyeing sub-$2K ETH as price hovers at $3K; data indicates potential dip to $1,850 if supports break.
data.description: Even though Ether has recently rebounded to $3,000, analysis indicates that there is a possibility of a significant drop in ETH price to $1,850 if crucial support levels are breached.

data.title: DoorDash partners with Hibbett, giving access to 1,000 stores for on-demand retail. Customers can order apparel, footwear, and accessories from top brands like Nike, Jordan, Adidas, and New Balance.
data.description: DoorDash, Inc. (NASDAQ: DASH) has recently partnered with Hibbett, Inc. to provide on-demand access to footwear, apparel, and accessories throughout the United States, leveraging around 1,000 stores. This collaboration aims to enhance the accessibility of Hibbett's products through DoorDash, particularly in the Southeast and Southwest regions. Customers now have the convenience to order various Hibbett athletic essentials, including footwear, apparel, and accessories from popular brands like Nike, Jordan, adidas, and New Balance through DoorDash for home delivery. Additionally, Hibbett will also be accessible via DashPass, offering more benefits to customers.

data.title: Engrain and Billee integrating to offer data-driven utility cost calculations for multifamily housing.
data.description: In Denver, a leading provider of interactive touring, mapping, and data visualization software for the built environment, Engrain, revealed a new partnership on Jan. 22, 2026. The integration will be with Billee, a contemporary utility billing platform specially designed for multifamily housing. This upcoming collaboration aims to combine Engrain's expertise in software solutions with Billee's innovative approach to utility billing within the multifamily housing sector.

data.title: Life Time's revenue up 12.2% to $745M in Q4, estimated profit rise to $123M. Full-year revenue up 14.2% to $2.995B, profit rise to $374M.
data.description: The anticipated total revenue is projected to rise by 12.2%, reaching a range of $743 million to $745 million for the fourth quarter. For the entire year, there is an estimated increase of 14.2%, with figures ranging from $2,993 million to $2,995 million. Regarding net income, there is a forecasted 226.6% increase, reaching between $120 million to $123 million for the fourth quarter. For the year in entirety, there is an estimated upsurge of 138.5%, with figures ranging between $371 million and $374 million.

data.title: McCormick posts strong 2025 financial results as a global leader in flavor; outlook for 2026 looks promising.
data.description: In Hunt Valley, Maryland, on January 22, 2026, McCormick & Company, Incorporated, a renowned flavor industry leader, shared its financial update for Q4 and fiscal year ending on November 30, 2025. The company (NYSE:MKC) also outlined its financial forecast for the year 2026. Key details include net sales figures and future projections.

data.title: Spire Global (NYSE: SPIR) chosen by AiDASH to enhance electric grid safety with satellite weather data.
data.description: Spire Global, Inc., a global provider of satellite data, analytics, and intelligence, recently announced that it was chosen by AiDASH, a prominent provider of vegetation, storm, and ignition risk intelligence, along with SatelliteFirst™ grid monitoring solutions. The partnership aims to bolster AiDASH's integrated solution for safeguarding the contemporary electric grid against vegetation and weather-related hazards. Spire, listed on the NYSE as SPIR, will supply advanced weather intelligence and data to augment AiDASH's offerings, improving grid security and resilience.
